verbatim_quote: And in many settings where we have these non-differentiable rewards, a typical framework that we use is reinforcement learning. In fact, DeepSeq R1 and a line of work on RL with verifiable rewards use the standard RL approach to optimize these terminal rewards and improve the performance of LLMs.
